V3.S.2.description: V3.S.2 : Minimum corner-to-corner spacing between two V3 instances——both with a 5 nm M4 end-cap——is 23 nm.

V3.M3.EN.1.description: V3.M3.EN.1 : Minimum enclosure of V3 by M3 on at least two opposite sides is 5 nm.

V3.M4.EN.2.description: V3.M4.EN.2 : Minimum enclosure of V3 by M4 on at least two opposite sides is 11 nm.

V3.AUX.1.description: V3.AUX.1 : V3 must be inside M3 and M4.

M4.W.1.description: M4.W.1 : Minimum vertical width of M4 is 24 nm.

M4.W.5.description: M4.W.5 : Minimum horizontal width of M4 is 44 nm.

M4.S.1.description: M4.S.1 : Minimum vertical spacing between two M4 layer polygons' edges, regardless of the edge lengths and mask colors, is 24 nm.

M4.S.2.description: M4.S.2 : Minimum horizontal spacing between two M4 layer polygons' edges, regardless of the edge lengths and mask colors, is 40 nm.

M4.S.3.description: M4.S.3 : Minimum tip-to-tip spacing between two M4 layer polygons——that do not share a parallel run length——on adjacent tracks is 40 nm.

M4.S.4.description: M4.S.4 : Minimum tip-to-tip spacing between two M4 layer polygons——that share a parallel run length——on adjacent tracks is 40 nm.

M4.AUX.1.description: M4.AUX.1 : M4 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.
